prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild dormitory, Haru Emberlane, a masculine coordinator in a formal cloak with a ribboned notebook, holds a pulsing, sleepy-aura emitting crystal artifact. Haru Starling, an androgynous mage in layered blue robes with floating spell tags, stands close, hands raised in a focused arcane gesture to begin the neutralization. Cinematic camera, soft moonlight, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild shot; Haru Starling completes the arcane seal, pressing it onto the artifact as Haru Emberlane firmly presses his brass guild stamp onto the seal to lock the aura. The pulsing light fades into a calm, steady glow. Consistent identities, camera, and lighting, no text, no watermark.
